title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Easyday International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Easyday International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Easyday International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Easyday International Enterprises:
Easyday International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Easyday International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
